## Jefferies Flags Elevated Valuation Risk for Datadog After 94% YTD Rally Ahead of Q2 Earnings

A 94% YTD run compresses the margin of safety: Jefferies' note is a pre-earnings risk flag that any miss or guidance disappointment could trigger a sharp drawdown — relevant for sizing into DDOG into the print and for gauging how the market is pricing AI-driven observability growth expectations.

- DDOG has surged approximately 94% year-to-date, per both outlets echoing the same Jefferies framing.
- Jefferies specifically flags that the YTD rally leaves little margin for error heading into Q2 earnings.
- No specific valuation multiple, price target, or earnings estimate is disclosed beyond the 94% YTD figure.
- Both headlines are near-identical, suggesting this is a single Jefferies research note rather than independent views.
